title: Amaryllis muesseriana

However, the classification of this species may be subject to revisions as new research emerges. Further study is needed to confirm its precise classification within the Amaryllidaceae family.

parts: Amaryllis muesseriana, commonly known as the 'Pistachio' or 'Messeriana' Amaryllis, does not have well-documented medicinal properties. side_effects: Amaryllis muesseriana, being a plant, typically doesn't have direct side effects on humans.
